# MIRAGE: Multi-model Interface for Reviewing and Auditing Generative Text-to-Image AI

MIRAGE is an open-source tool for comparing text-to-image AI models side by side. It allows researchers, auditors, and users to evaluate the output of multiple models (e.g., Stable Diffusion, SDXL, Kandinsky, Playground) against a single prompt.

## Project Details
- Website: https://mirage.matheus.wiki/
- Compare Models (English): https://mirage.matheus.wiki/compare.html
- Compare Models (Portuguese): https://mirage.matheus.wiki/compare-pt.html
- Instructions (English): https://mirage.matheus.wiki/instructions.html
- Instructions (Portuguese): https://mirage.matheus.wiki/instructions-pt.html
- Source Code: https://github.com/matheusmaldaner/mirage
- Papers:
  - CI 2025: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.21547
  - HCOMP 2024: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.19252
